title: SlashBladeJapaneseAddonPack
description: This is a Remastered of Ferne and other Japanese players' SlashBlade Addon.
body:
Welcome to SJAP, or SlashBlade Japanese Addon Pack.  
This is a Remastered of Ferne and other Japanese players' SlashBlade Addon.  
  
Included Addons List:
- Nihil
- SlashBladeWA
- BladeMaster
- FluorescentBar
- FrostWolf
- Kamuy
- Kirisaya
- Laemmle
- MURASAMA（Need COFH Core）
- TerraBlade（Need Botania）
- Toyako
- Wanderer（Compat with MURASAMA）
- Yukari
- DarkRaven（Need Twilight Forest）
- BladeofZephyr（Need ThaumCraft 6）  

Enjoy your new blades!
